channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine's Drone Commander Plots Crimea Isolation Campaign
item.description: Ukraine's drone forces chief reveals plans to sever Crimea's connection to Russia through coordinated strikes on the Kerch Bridge and logistics routes. The strategy aims to isolate the occupied peninsula from Russian supply lines.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Arrests US Academic at Conference for Espionage
item.description: China detained Min Zin, a US academic specializing in Myanmar and Chinese foreign policy, during a conference on espionage charges. The arrest comes just a month after Trump visited Beijing amid already-strained US-China relations.

item.title: 🛢️ Questions Mount Over US Claims of Secret Hormuz Oil Mission
item.description: Trump claims hundreds of tankers have escaped Iran's blockade through a secret US operation, but shipping data raises questions. The reported shipments appear to be increasing but the details remain murky.

item.title: 🇳🇬 Nigeria Claims 13,000 Terrorists Neutralized in Past Year
item.description: Nigerian president says the military has killed more than 13,000 terrorists in the last year as the country battles armed groups including Boko Haram. The announcement comes amid ongoing security challenges in the north.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Defense Plans in Chaos Ahead of NATO Summit
item.description: Britain's defense spending strategy is in disarray just weeks before a crucial NATO summit. Plans for a major rearmament drive to deter Russia and reinforce UK commitments are facing political and budgetary obstacles.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇨🇳 Europe Blaming China's Economic Rise for Its Own Failures, Think Tank Says
item.description: A new analysis argues European policymakers are scapegoating China rather than addressing structural weaknesses in their own economies, amid tensions over trade and competitiveness.

item.title: 🐢 China Accuses 'Spy Turtles' of Snooping on Its Coast
item.description: Beijing claims marine animals fitted with surveillance equipment are being used to monitor Chinese waters, in an unusual accusation highlighting ongoing tensions over intelligence gathering.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran-Linked Group Claims Hack of FBI Drones
item.description: An Iranian-linked cyber group has claimed responsibility for hacking FBI drone systems, adding a new dimension to the ongoing conflict's cyber warfare dimension.

item.title: 💰 Oil Prices Slide as Traders Bet on Diplomacy
item.description: Markets are pricing in reduced conflict risk as diplomatic efforts between the US and Iran appear to be making progress, with Trump calling off planned strikes.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli Firm Targeted Elections in NYC and Scotland, French Watchdog Says
item.description: France's cyber watchdog has implicated an Israeli firm in election interference operations targeting New York City and Scottish elections, expanding concerns about private sector disinformation.

item.title: ⚔️ Top US Ally's Defense Chief Quits, Warns Military Lacks Resources
item.description: A key US ally's defense secretary has resigned, issuing stark warnings that the military is under-resourced for emerging threats amid global tension escalation.

item.title: 🌐 Tech Executives to Attend G7 Summit as Leaders Address AI, Online Safety
item.description: AI executives from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google and Mistral AI are expected to attend next week's G7 summit as France crafts an agenda focused on artificial intelligence governance and digital safety.

item.title: 🇫🇷 Geneva Steps Up Security for 50,000-Strong G7 Protest
item.description: Swiss authorities are deploying major security measures as France hosts the G7 summit, with protests expected to draw tens of thousands of demonstrators.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Extends Losses as Trump Calls Off Planned Iran Strikes
item.description: Crude prices continued falling as President Trump cancelled planned military strikes on Iran, citing progress in diplomatic talks and potential deal framework.

item.title: ✈️ US Plans Major Cut to Fighter Jets, Warships for NATO Operations in Europe
item.description: The US is considering significant reductions in fighter jet and warship deployments for NATO operations in Europe, according to NYT reports, raising alliance concerns about deterrence capabilities.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Cancels High-Level Meetings With EU, FT Reports
item.description: Beijing has cancelled scheduled high-level meetings with the European Union amid growing tensions over trade, technology, and human rights issues, signaling further deterioration in relations.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Conflict Leaves World in Dangerous Limbo
item.description: Two months after a nominal ceasefire, Iran, Israel and the US remain locked in low-intensity conflict with no clear resolution in sight, creating sustained global uncertainty about escalation risks.

item.title: 🇷🇺 German Army Chief Warns Russia Will Be Prepared to Attack NATO by 2029
item.description: Germany's military commander has issued a stark warning that Russia will have the capability to attack NATO within three years, calling for urgent rearmament and improved alliance readiness.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Strikes Iranian Weapons Convoy in Syria, Sources Say
item.description: Israeli forces struck an Iranian weapons convoy in Syria, according to regional sources, continuing operations against Iranian military infrastructure despite ongoing ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Targets Iranian Weapons Depot in Syria
item.description: Israeli airstrikes targeted an Iranian weapons depot in Syria, continuing operations against Iranian military infrastructure amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Continues Strikes on Iranian Targets Despite Ceasefire
item.description: Israeli military operations against Iranian-linked targets continue despite ongoing ceasefire discussions, highlighting the gap between diplomatic talks and ground realities.

item.title: 🦠 Cracked Coffin, Funeral Hunt for Ebola's Patient Zero
item.description: Health investigators are tracing the origins of Congo's Ebola outbreak, examining funeral practices and potential patient zero cases as the outbreak spreads.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Two Killed, 10 Injured in Ukraine Attack on Russia's Bryansk Region
item.description: A Ukrainian attack on Russia's Bryansk border region killed two people and injured ten others, according to the regional governor, as cross-border strikes continue.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Says Iran Deal Close, Strait of Hormuz Tensions Linger
item.description: President Trump announced progress toward a deal with Iran while tensions over the strategic Strait of Hormuz waterway remain unresolved. Iranian officials expressed skepticism about the framework.

item.title: 🌐 G7 Worried About Global Economic Imbalances
item.description: Group of Seven leaders are expressing concerns about mounting global economic imbalances as they prepare for summit discussions on trade, currency, and growth sustainability.
